3077340.name: はむぱふぇ　ハムスターのスイーツパズル
3077340.description:
Let's play puzzle with “funny” hamsters!

Raise your hamster with Sweets Puzzle!
A 3-match puzzle game based on the concept of sweets is now available!
You can dress up your hamsters and customize their cages with the rewards you get from puzzle games!

About 600 kinds of hamsters x 90 kinds of accessories!

About 600 kinds of hamsters are available!
And there are 90 kinds of accessories to dress up your hamsters!
Let's dress up your favorite hamsters and make them adorable!
You can change the clothes on the hamster's “head” and “back”.
